  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Attachment
    Represents metadata describing an email attachment.
    AuthResponse
    Response object returned after authentication-related operations.
    DeleteAccountRequest
    Request object used for account deletion operations.
    EmailAddressDTO
    Data transfer object containing email account configuration details.
    EmailMessage
    Represents a complete email message returned by the application.
    LoginRequest
    Request object used during user authentication.
    MoveMailRequest
    Request object used for moving an email message between folders.
    PasswordChangeRequest
    Request object used for password change operations.
    RegisterRequest
    Request object used during user registration.
